name: Eloxx Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: Eloxx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a pharmaceutical company filing a comprehensive Annual Report covering fiscal years 2023, 2024, and 2025 as part of efforts to become current in SEC filing obligations. The filing represents their first periodic SEC submission since a Form 10-Q filed November 13, 2023. Specific products, services, and business operations are not described in the provided Item 1 excerpt.
